raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (the causal question) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (causal inference treatment) but does not articulate the delta with other works.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (the IV claim contradicts the unconfoundedness assumption).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.2,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.1
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (the causal question) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (causal inference treatment) but does not articulate the delta with other works.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (the IV claim contradicts the unconfoundedness assumption).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
